context.purpose: Read-only inspection of installed runtime skill metadata, dependencies, eligibility, and bounded load diagnostics.
context.runtimeSkillPlain: reviewed instructions for using tools that are already registered
context.headline: {skills} skills and {bundles} bundles installed for {agent}

banner.title: Inspection only.
banner.body: Loading rechecks trust and returns complete artifacts. This console cannot install, enable, approve, or execute a skill.

section.bundlesDescription: Ordered reviewed skill sets with exact versions and effective compatibility
section.diagnosticsDescription: Bounded outcomes only. Skill bodies and reference content are never retained here.

error.installedCount: invalid read API response: skills.installed_count MUST match items
error.eligibleCount: invalid read API response: skills.eligible_count MUST match eligible items
error.uniqueNames: invalid read API response: skill names MUST be unique
error.installedBundleCount: invalid read API response: skills.installed_bundle_count MUST match bundles
error.eligibleBundleCount: invalid read API response: skills.eligible_bundle_count MUST match eligible bundles
error.uniqueBundleNames: invalid read API response: skill bundle names MUST be unique
error.digestStrings: invalid read API response: {label}.digests MUST contain strings
error.nullableString: invalid read API response: {label} MUST be a string or null

context.purpose: Directory of declared operator capability contracts, required roles, side-effect classes, and default safety modes. Catalog presence does not grant execution eligibility.
context.headline: {count} declarations across {categories} categories; {mutating} declare a mutating side-effect class

banner.title: Catalog declarations only.
banner.body: Source: {source}. Entries describe governed contracts; they do not prove provider binding, runtime health, or execution eligibility.

filter.searchPlaceholder: Filter capability id, name, tag, or summary

error.count: invalid read API response: capabilities.count MUST match items
error.uniqueIds: invalid read API response: capability ids MUST be unique

promotion.unavailable: Promotion-gate dashboard route is not wired on this deployment. Set ReadApiConfig.promotion_gate_source in the composition root to enable it.
promotion.subtitle: Per-ActionType readiness against each shipped promotion_gate. Actions promote from shadow to enforce only when every gap is closed.

context.purpose: Which ActionTypes running in shadow mode have met their promotion gate (measured accuracy with zero policy escapes) and are ready to enforce, and which are still blocked and why. Read-only: promotion itself is a separately reviewed change.
context.headline: {ready} ready - {blocked} blocked{window}

banner.title: Shadow before enforce.
banner.body: Promotion is a separately reviewed catalog PR. This screen only renders measured readiness.

promotion.empty: No ActionTypes declared a promotion gate.

error.windowDays: invalid read API response: promotion gates.window_days MUST be a non-negative number or null
error.agreedCount: invalid read API response: promotion gate row.agreed_count MUST NOT exceed reviewed_count
error.summaryCounts: invalid read API response: promotion gate summary counts MUST match rows

rules.lifecycleInvalid: The requested rule lifecycle status is not registered.
rules.lifecycleUnavailable: Rule {status} lifecycle evidence is not exposed by this deployment.
rules.routeUnavailable: The rule-catalog route is not wired on this deployment. Set ReadApiConfig.rule_catalog_rules / rule_catalog_collected_rules in the composition root to enable it.
rules.subtitle: Every policy the system knows: the active catalog T0 evaluates plus the imported collected corpus. Read-only - rule changes flow through the catalog pipeline as PRs.

context.purpose: The versioned rule catalog the deterministic engine (T0) evaluates - each rule normalized to id/severity/category/resource-type/check/remediation with provenance. Filter by origin, category, severity, or source. Read-only reference.
context.headline: {total} rules ({active} active, {collected} collected)

banner.title: Catalog-as-code.
banner.body: Every rule is a versioned artifact. This page renders active and collected entries; changes land through the catalog PR pipeline.

result.empty: No rules match the current filters.

detail.title: Rule detail
detail.historicalBody: {id} is not in the current rule catalog. It may have been retired, renamed, or excluded from this deployment.
detail.noCheckBody: No inline body - this check is an external reference ({kind}).
detail.noFixBody: No inline remediation template body available.
detail.noDescription: No authored description for this rule. See the check logic and remediation below for what it enforces and how to fix it.
detail.inventoryUnavailable: No inventory evaluation is wired on this deployment. When this rule runs against your inventory, each affected resource and the exact attribute at fault (the deny reason) appears here.
detail.noViolations: No resources currently violate this rule.

severityRisk.critical: Critical - a violation is an immediate, high-impact exposure.
severityRisk.high: High - a violation is a serious risk that should be fixed promptly.
severityRisk.medium: Medium - a violation weakens posture and should be scheduled.
severityRisk.low: Low - a violation is a minor or best-practice gap.
